release_candidate_required_gates.evidence: go test ./... covers proxy/WebRTC policy, managed extra arg collision, profile lock, dry-run command generation, and wrapper/browser package behavior.
python3 -m unittest tests.test_detector_harness covers target listing, matrix planning, proxy-preflight prerequisite JSON, validation, sanitization rejection, operational timeout, and KG JSONL edges.

python3 -m unittest tests.test_package_runtime covers platform plan support for linux-x64, macos-arm64, macos-x64, and windows-x64; Linux runtime sidecar packaging; macOS .app bundle layout preservation/rejection for arm64 and x64; Windows portable Chromium exe/DLL/pak/bin/locale packaging; checksums; non-placeholder SPDX-2.3-style SBOM metadata; file hashes/sizes; and source/patchset provenance hashes.

BrowseForge commit aba5248 dispatches browseforge-chromium through the Chromium launcher, writes a profile-scoped native stealth persona config with persona_id_hash and origin_salt_key, and preserves trimmed proxy region metadata through profile/group storage; adapter smoke passed with --browseforge-stealth-config plus --browseforge-stealth-mode=enabled and local dogfood evidence records GET/runtime config, profile create, session launch, RuntimeID reporting, profile isolation, and Playwright Bind connection.

source-acquisition.json records checked-out Chromium refs/tags/150.0.7871.101, Linux deps sync, Docker deps image, GN output at out/BrowseForgeLinuxDocker, and applied BrowseForge scaffold/webdriver/hardware/screen/platform/timezone/locale/user-agent/storage-quota/plugins/WebRTC/audio/canvas/WebGL/feature-parity(serial-port-connected)/fonts/process-priority/switch-propagation patches.

All four package contract artifacts exist and have committed checksums/SBOM/provenance metadata: browseforge-runtime-chromium-v0.1.0-alpha.0-linux-x64.zip sha256 386a971c6df4f9a57dc88acf2a4119db1e08e5d15557ea6b666ab1e4caedd9cf size 567880267; browseforge-runtime-chromium-v0.1.0-alpha.0-macos-arm64.zip sha256 828896101ce9454507277855397d8b9f1f0bc3cb0c7ce3f07f2ddf41cdf3e683 size 405358724; browseforge-runtime-chromium-v0.1.0-alpha.0-macos-x64.zip sha256 960c2b7fbcaa86c34b5857361fbcf1ef9a2dcd001806117021fd51b99e71bb25 size 472647619; browseforge-runtime-chromium-v0.1.0-alpha.0-windows-x64.zip sha256 dae221b4e96166190287bc88c0671f4654f19e4e9e7b2c5fc3fb2aad4519218b size 235414104. macos-x64 is packaged-only alpha: no launch smoke or detector evidence is claimed.

macOS arm64 headed external-proxy detector coverage is committed for BrowserLeaks, BrowserScan, CreepJS, iphey, Pixelscan, and SannySoft under detectors/evidence/v0.1.0-alpha.0/macos-arm64/*/*_headed_proxy_host_20260712.json; knowledge/manifests/proxy-surface-smoke.json records transparent canvas pixel RGBA [0,0,0,0], H.264/AAC MP4 codec availability, and America/Los_Angeles proxy persona timezone. Linux direct/headless Docker detector evidence remains recorded in the existing v0.1.0-alpha.0 evidence tree.

Primary artifact browseforge-runtime-chromium-v0.1.0-alpha.0-linux-x64 sha256 386a971c6df4f9a57dc88acf2a4119db1e08e5d15557ea6b666ab1e4caedd9cf size 567880267; each linux-x64, macos-arm64, macos-x64, and windows-x64 release zip contains artifact-manifest.json, provenance.json, SBOM.json, runtime.manifest.json, wrapper binary, and platform browser payload; dist/checksums.txt includes all four zip SHA-256 entries. macos-x64 metadata is packaged-only alpha and does not claim launch/detector evidence.
